description_long: This restaurant features a modern, boxy two-story structure with a flat roof and a rooftop railing. The exterior is clad in dark brown horizontal paneling, complemented by large windows and a prominent entrance with a wooden awning. The building is set on a wide paved lot that includes an outdoor seating area with benches, tables, and string lights suspended from poles. Solar panels are visible on the outdoor patio, suggesting an eco-friendly design. The restaurant's signage is mounted above the entrance, and there are utility elements such as trash bins and a side service door. The overall setting is urban, with the restaurant occupying a corner lot and providing ample space for patrons to gather outside.
description: A modern, two-story restaurant with dark brown paneling, large windows, and a spacious outdoor seating area featuring benches, tables, and string lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, signage, outdoor seating with benches and tables, and string lights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall, service door, and utility elements with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building, additional outdoor seating, solar panels, and utility access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the outdoor seating area, benches, tables, and decorative lighting.
attribute_signage: Rectangular sign with stylized text above the main entrance, mounted on the building facade.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is characterized by dark brown horizontal wood paneling, large rectangular windows, and a flat roof with a metal railing. A wooden awning marks the entrance, and string lights add a welcoming touch to the outdoor seating area. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor space.
